allow:
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$url = 'https://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.4-bin.zip'
\\$dest = 'C:\\\\gradle-8.4-bin.zip'
\\$installDir = 'C:\\\\Gradle'
Write-Host 'Downloading Gradle 8.4...'
[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \\$url -OutFile \\$dest -UseBasicParsing
Write-Host 'Extracting...'
Expand-Archive -Path \\$dest -DestinationPath \\$installDir -Force
Write-Host 'Done.'
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$url = 'https://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.4-bin.zip'
\\$dest = \\"\\$env:USERPROFILE\\\\gradle-8.4-bin.zip\\"
\\$installDir = \\"\\$env:USERPROFILE\\\\Gradle\\"
Write-Host \\"Downloading to \\$dest ...\\"
[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \\$url -OutFile \\$dest -UseBasicParsing
Write-Host 'Extracting...'
Expand-Archive -Path \\$dest -DestinationPath \\$installDir -Force
Write-Host 'Cleaning up zip...'
Remove-Item \\$dest -Force
Write-Host \\"Installed to \\$installDir\\\\gradle-8.4\\"
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$url = 'https://github.com/adoptium/temurin17-binaries/releases/download/jdk-17.0.9%2B9/OpenJDK17U-jdk_x64_windows_hotspot_17.0.9_9.zip'
\\$dest = \\"\\$env:USERPROFILE\\\\jdk17.zip\\"
\\$installDir = \\"\\$env:USERPROFILE\\\\Java\\"
Write-Host 'Downloading JDK 17...'
[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \\$url -OutFile \\$dest -UseBasicParsing
Write-Host 'Extracting...'
Expand-Archive -Path \\$dest -DestinationPath \\$installDir -Force
Remove-Item \\$dest -Force
\\$jdkDir = \(Get-ChildItem \\$installDir | Select-Object -First 1\).FullName
Write-Host \\"JDK installed to \\$jdkDir\\"
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\Java' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\Eclipse Adoptium' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft' -Filter '*jdk*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\Amazon Corretto' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
\\$env:JAVA_HOME
" 2>&1)
Bash(cmd /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %a in \('netstat -ano ^| findstr :5173 ^| findstr LISTENING'\) do taskkill /PID %a /F" 2>&1)
